name: Screaming Frog Crawl Result Structure
description: Structure for a URL crawl result from the Screaming Frog SEO Spider tool

structure.status_code: integer - HTTP response status code (200, 301, 404, etc.)
structure.title: string - Page title tag content
structure.inlinks: integer - Number of internal links to this URL
structure.outlinks: integer - Number of links from this page
structure.crawl_depth: integer - Click depth from start URL
structure.response_time: number - Server response time in seconds
